title: Pan-Seared Fish Fillet with Gooey Cheese
description: A delicious and easy-to-make fish dish that's perfect for a weeknight dinner. The gooey cheese adds a rich and creamy element to the dish.
instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the fish fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
While the fish is baking, sprinkle the gooey cheese on top.
Return the skillet to the stovetop and place over low heat.
Let the cheese melt and bubble for 1-2 minutes.
Serve the fish hot, topped with the gooey cheese.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
